thesis_summary: Bullish continuation is valid only if RTH holds the overnight pullback zone and reclaims prior-day high area early.

checks.label: Hold above overnight demand
checks.rationale: Acceptance below the overnight lower band would turn the gap posture into failed strength.

checks.label: Opening print avoids clean downside break
checks.rationale: The bullish case can tolerate a dip, but not a decisive trend_break_down.

checks.label: Reclaim prior-day high zone
checks.rationale: Holding above 28725 converts the prior high from resistance into support.

checks.label: First 30 minutes protects pullback low
checks.rationale: A low below 28635 during the first 30 minutes would signal acceptance back inside lower overnight range.

checks.label: Mid-morning above VWAP
checks.rationale: Bullish continuation requires buyers to control VWAP after the opening rotation.
